title: Update github.com/containers/image
body: Update `github.com/containers/image` to version 5e5b67d6b1cf43cc349128ec3ed7d5283a6cc0d1, which returns the new image's manifest when we copy an image from one place to another.  Return the digest of that manifest, and a canonical reference, from our `Commit` and `Push` APIs.
